title: The Appropriation (Railways Supplementary) Ordinance, 1977
description: An Ordinance to authorise expenditure of certain further sums in respect of Bangladesh Railways from and out of the Consolidated Fund for the services of the financial year ending on the thirtieth day of June, 1977. WHEREAS it is expedient to authorise expenditure of certain further sums in respect of Bangladesh Railways from and out of the Consolidated Fund for the services of the financial year ending on the thi...

provisions.title: 1. Short title
provisions.content: 1. This Ordinance may be called the Appropriation (Railways Supplementary) Ordinance, 1977 .

provisions.title: 2. Issue of Taka 6,04,78,000 out of the Consolidated Fund for the year 1976-77
provisions.content: 2. There may be paid and applied from and out of the Consolidated Fund sums not exceeding those specified in column 3 of the Schedule amounting in the aggregate to the sum of Taka six crores four lakhs and seventy-eight thousand towards defraying the several charges which will come in course of payment during the financial year ending on the thirtieth day of June, 1977, in respect of Bangladesh Railways for the services and purposes specified in column 2 of the Schedule.

provisions.title: 3. Appropriation
provisions.content: 3. The sums authorised to be paid and applied from and out of the Consolidated Fund by this Ordinance shall be appropriated in respect of Bangladesh Railways for the services and purposes expressed in the Schedule in relation to the financial year ending on the thirtieth day of June, 1977.
